_description: Fill in this template to define a new workflow for the AWLM WorkflowBuilder
name: Department Name - WF## Description
description: One paragraph describing the workflow's business purpose and what it automates.
business_kpi: e.g., Reduce invoice processing time by 50%
technical_kpi: e.g., >95% success rate, <30s avg execution time

trigger_config._comment: For schedule: cron expression. For webhook: path and method.

connections._comment: Optional — if omitted, nodes are connected sequentially

credentials_needed: n8n credential type names needed, e.g.: httpHeaderAuth, airtableTokenApi, gmailOAuth2
fallback_logic: Describe what happens when the workflow fails after all retries.
test_requirements: Must process sample data without errors
rollback_plan: Deactivate workflow, restore from backup JSON in .tmp/backups/
